metadata.name: API Test Agent Golden Dataset
metadata.description: Golden test cases for evaluating API test agent quality

cases.name: Mock Buggy API — bug detection
cases.description: Test against mock API with 5 known bugs. Agent should detect at least 3 of them.
expected_bugs: GET /api/users/999 returns HTML instead of JSON
POST /api/users does not escape SQL injection

cases.name: Healthy API — should pass cleanly
cases.description: Test against a well-implemented API. Agent should achieve high pass rate.

cases.name: Petstore API — standard OpenAPI
cases.description: Test against Swagger Petstore (public). Standard OpenAPI 3.0 spec.

cases.name: Spec parsing — $ref resolution
cases.description: Verify agent correctly resolves $ref references in schemas.

cases.name: Security testing — injection detection
cases.description: Verify agent generates and executes security test cases (SQLi, XSS).
